# SEO/AEO Audit — mz-website
**Date:** 2026-03-16 | **Pages Audited:** 7/30 (Batch 1: Core + Solutions)
**Auditor:** Webmaster Agent

---

| Dimension | Score | Max | Notes |
|-----------|------:|----:|-------|
| Technical SEO | 16 | 40 | Missing canonical, hreflang, OG, Twitter Card, robots meta on ALL pages |
| Content SEO | 24 | 30 | Solid content; title lengths weak on 5/7 pages |
| AEO Readiness | 9 | 30 | llms.txt now exists; JSON-LD missing site-wide |

**Root cause:** All 7 pages are missing the same 5 technical SEO elements. One fix session will add ~18 points to every page's score.

---

## Issues by Severity

### 🔴 Critical — Fix Immediately (affects all 7 pages)

**C1. Canonical tag missing** — 0/7 pages have `<link rel="canonical">`
- Risk: Duplicate content penalties if CloudFront/S3 serves multiple URLs
- Fix: Add `<link rel="canonical" href="https://mezzofy.com/[page].html">` to every `<head>`

**C2. hreflang tags missing** — 0/7 pages have language alternates
- Risk: Google cannot identify language/region targeting; wrong-language pages shown to users
- Fix: Add 4 `<link rel="alternate" hreflang="...">` tags (en, zh-TW, zh-CN, x-default) to every page
- Note: Self-referencing (same URL) since site uses JS-based i18n

**C3. Open Graph tags missing** — 0/7 pages have OG metadata
- Risk: AI crawlers (Perplexity, ChatGPT) and social shares show no preview; AEO citation quality drops
- Affects: All 8 required properties (og:type, og:title, og:description, og:url, og:image, og:site_name, og:locale, og:locale:alternate)

**C4. Twitter/X Card tags missing** — 0/7 pages have Twitter Card meta
- Risk: X/LinkedIn shares render blank cards, reducing click-through from social
- Fix: Add 5 twitter: meta tags per page

**C5. JSON-LD structured data missing** — 0/7 pages have any schema markup
- Risk: Zero AEO eligibility for Google AI Overviews, Perplexity answer boxes, rich results
- Priority fix order: Organization (homepage) → WebPage (all) → FAQPage (merchants, distributors, developers, ai-commerce)

---

### 🟠 High — Fix This Session

**H1. Title tags too short on 5/7 pages**

| Page | Current Title | Chars | Issue |
|------|--------------|:-----:|-------|
| about.html | "About Us - Mezzofy" | 18 | Too short — no keyword |
| contact.html | "Contact Us - Mezzofy" | 20 | Too short — no keyword |
| for-merchants.html | "For Merchants - Mezzofy" | 23 | Too short — no keyword |
| for-distributors.html | "For Distributors \| Mezzofy" | 26 | Too short — no keyword |
| for-ai-commerce.html | "AI Commerce - Mezzofy \| The Coupon Infrastructure for AI Agents" | 63 | 3 chars over limit |

✅ Good: for-developers.html (55 chars), index.html (46 chars — acceptable)

**Recommended titles:**
- `about.html` → "About Mezzofy — Global Coupon Exchange Protocol Company" (56 chars)
- `contact.html` → "Contact Mezzofy — Digital Coupon Platform Support" (50 chars)
- `for-merchants.html` → "Digital Coupons for Merchants | Mezzofy Exchange" (49 chars)
- `for-distributors.html` → "Coupon Distribution Platform for Distributors | Mezzofy" (55 chars)
- `for-ai-commerce.html` → "AI Commerce Coupons | Mezzofy for AI Agents" (44 chars)

**H2. Meta description length off on 5/7 pages**

| Page | Chars | Issue |
|------|:-----:|-------|
| index.html | 118 | Too short (need 150–160) |
| contact.html | 117 | Too short |
| for-merchants.html | 176 | Too long — may be truncated |
| for-developers.html | 109 | Too short |

✅ Good: about.html (140), for-distributors.html (161), for-ai-commerce.html (162)

**H3. robots meta tag absent on all pages**
- Add `<meta name="robots" content="index, follow">` to all pages
- Add `<meta name="robots" content="noindex, nofollow">` to 404.html and test pages only

---

### 🟡 Medium

**M1. OG image may not exist**
- All OG tags will reference `assets/images/og-image.jpg`
- Need to verify this file exists at 1200×630px
- If missing, AI and social crawlers will show no image preview

**M2. No FAQPage schema on solution pages**
- for-merchants.html, for-distributors.html, for-developers.html, for-ai-commerce.html
- FAQPage schema feeds directly into Google AI Overviews and Perplexity answer boxes
- Highest AEO ROI fix available

**M3. No Organization schema on homepage**
- index.html and about.html should carry Organization JSON-LD with foundingDate, sameAs social profiles
- Critical for E-E-A-T signals

---

### 🟢 Low

**L1. No Speakable schema**
- Low priority — voice search is minor traffic driver
- Add after JSON-LD and FAQ schemas are complete

**L2. index.html title slightly short** (46 chars vs 50–60 ideal)
- "Mezzofy - The Global Coupon Exchange Protocol" → consider expanding to ~52 chars

---

### ✅ Passing Site-Wide (Batch 1)

- ✅ `<html lang="en">` set on all pages (i18n.js updates dynamically on language switch)
- ✅ Single `<h1>` per page — all 7 pages confirmed
- ✅ All pages in sitemap.xml (now with hreflang xhtml:link entries)
- ✅ `llms.txt` created (AEO: AI crawler permissions active)
- ✅ robots.txt updated with AI bot rules (GPTBot, PerplexityBot, ClaudeBot, anthropic-ai)
- ✅ Brand color #FF6B35 consistent across all 7 pages
- ✅ i18n implemented on all pages (EN, zh-TW, zh-CN)
- ✅ Mobile-first responsive design
- ✅ Unique meta descriptions across all 7 pages
